message:
fix(progress): use absolute velocity in animation check

progress.rs:
- Change is_animating() to check velocity.abs() < 0.01 instead of velocity < 0.01
- Bug: negative velocity (backward motion) was incorrectly detected as "not animating"
  because -0.5 < 0.01 is true even though the bar is clearly moving
- In under-damped springs, velocity oscillates and can go negative while still
  having significant momentum toward the target

Add test_progress_animation_negative_velocity:
- Test that significant negative velocity (-0.5) is detected as animating
- Test that tiny negative velocity (-0.001) at target is not animating
- Verifies the fix works for both directions of motion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
